title: chrysanthemum leucanthemum var. auriculatum
intro: Chrysanthemum leucanthemum var. auriculatum, also known as the ear-drop white daisy, is a variety of the perennial plant Chrysanthemum leucanthemum, native to Europe and Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving headaches and joint pain, and improving digestion. It is commonly prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
